title: BridgeTrustEntry
description: One row of the bridge_trust Room table (introduced in MIGRATION_12_13). Persisted in data/BridgeTrustEntity.kt; this schema serialises the row for export / debugging / cross-process IPC.

bridge_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the bridge's stable identifier.

first_seen_at.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when this bridge was first imported.

last_seen_at.description: Unix epoch milliseconds of the most recent import for this bridge_hash.
